articles.title: 'Hormuz Disruption Single Most Consequential Variable For India's Inflation Outlook': Finance Ministry Review

articles.title: PVR Inox dismisses reports of legal row with Vashu Bhagnani's company
articles.description: PVR Inox Pictures denied reports of legal action against Vashu Bhagnani's Puja Entertainment, calling claims of a dispute over a three-film deal "misleading". The company praised its cordial relationship with the Bhagnani family.

articles.title: GTA Online players can now claim a free Higgins Helitours business and earn 4X GTA$ this week
articles.description: Rockstar Games is offering significant GTA Online bonuses until June 3, focusing on Money Fronts businesses. Players can acquire the Higgins Helitours business for free and earn boosted payouts on Money Laundering Missions and car wash income. Additional rewards are available for Lamar Contact Missions, Mr Faber Work, and Community Combat Series events.

articles.title: Transport association urges government to cut fuel prices as crude falls to $90/barrel
articles.description: The All India Motor & Goods Transport Association is calling on the Central Government to lower petrol and diesel prices. They point to a significant drop in international crude oil rates. The association states that consumers and transporters are not benefiting from this global price fall. Higher fuel costs are impacting essential goods and contributing to inflation.

articles.title: Ahmedabad-Colombo direct flight cuts travel time to 3 hours; Gujarat could emerge as key market for Sri Lanka tourism
articles.description: Tourism industry leaders said Gujarat could emerge as one of Sri Lanka's biggest tourism growth markets in the coming years.

articles.title: 'Raat Ko Zyada Ladkiyon Ke Order Hote Hain': Zepto Delivery Agent Reveals Customers' Ordering Habits
articles.description: A Zepto delivery partner has gone viral after sharing a humorous take on late-night delivery orders, claiming that many midnight snack requests come with instructions such as “phone karna, bell mat bajana.”

articles.title: Tesla slashes Model Y price by up to Rs 9 lakh in India to spur demand
articles.description: Tesla has significantly reduced Model Y prices in India, with the Premium RWD now costing Rs 9 lakh less. This strategic move aims to boost demand for its imported EVs, making them more accessible to a wider audience.

articles.title: Airbnb leases 46,437 sq ft for GCC at DLF Cybercity Gurugram for ₹61.5 lakh monthly rent
articles.description: Airbnb has leased 46,437 sq ft of office space for its GCC at DLF Cybercity, Gurugram, at a monthly rent of ₹61.53 lakh under a five-year lease agreement

articles.description: The comments by the finance ministry come days before the Reserve Bank of India’s Monetary Policy Committee announces its interest rate decision on June 5.

articles.title: Bitcoin retreats to $73K, but ETF inflows and shrinking exchange reserves keep bulls hopeful
articles.description: Bitcoin dipped to $73,000 despite ETF inflows and shrinking exchange reserves, failing to maintain momentum after touching $83,000 in May. Ethereum also faced pressure, trading below $2,000. While short-term technicals remain cautious, long-term holder accumulation and scaling developments support broader market structure.

articles.title: ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India gets first PM-SETU nod; Andhra Pradesh leads industry-driven ITI overhaul
articles.description: ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India secured the first Strategic Investment Plan approval under the Pradhan Mantri Skilling and Employability Transformation through Upgraded ITIs scheme. This marks a significant step in modernizing vocational education through industry partnerships. Andhra Pradesh leads as the first state to operationalize an industry partnership under the PM-SETU initiative. The program aims to transform 1,000 government ITIs nationwide.

articles.title: Ice cream, frozen dessert or frozen yogurt? Why the difference matters
articles.description: For years, a large portion of the Indian frozen treats market operated in the frozen dessert category, using vegetable fats instead of dairy fat.

articles.title: UP set to see 10% hike in electricity bills as govt announces ‘fuel surcharge’
articles.description: The revised bills will be implemented in the June billing cycle, where consumers will have to pay additional 10 per cent of their electricity usage.

articles.title: Gold demand drops 70% after sharp duty hike in India
articles.description: Demand fell to about 7.5 tonnes in the fortnight ended May 27 from around 25 tonnes a year earlier, according to industry estimates. The government increased the import duty on gold to 15% from 6% with effect from May 13.

articles.title: RBI warns West Asia war may hurt India growth outlook
articles.description: The central bank said the impact of the conflict is likely to remain contained in the near term but warned that an escalation could derail India's otherwise positive growth trajectory.
